query:
SELECT 
  region,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN brandUrl IS NOT NULL AND brandUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_url,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN brandUrl IS NOT NULL AND brandUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 0) as pct
FROM products
GROUP BY region
ORDER BY region;
